about.heading: What is Irig Poker?
about.subtitle: A custom poker variant where bluffing is the name of the game.
about.description: Irig Poker is a real-time multiplayer card game that blends traditional poker hand rankings with a unique bluffing mechanic. Each player receives just one card, and the challenge is to convince others you hold a stronger hand than you really do.
rules: Each player receives one card - only you can see your own card
On your turn, claim what poker hand you hold (you may bluff!)
The next player must either claim a stronger hand or call your bluff
When a bluff is called, all cards are revealed - if your claimed hand exists in the pool of cards, you win the round
The loser gains a card - eliminated at 7* cards
The last player standing wins the game
about.note: *The number of cards required for elimination depends on the number of players
